case_title: ORTIZ, ISAIAS MARTINEZ VS LUKBAN, ALEXEI F.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUKBAN, ALEXEI F.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ORTIZ, ISAIAS MARTINEZ AS TO DEFENDANT LUKBAN, ALEXEI F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, ISAIAS MARTINEZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUKBAN, ALEXEI F. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. ARBITRATION LETTER SENT BY PLAINTIFF IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 116.540 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
